scripts.postinstall: mkdir -p public/slds && cp node_modules/@salesforce-ux/design-system/assets/styles/salesforce-lightning-design-system.min.css public/slds/ && cp -r node_modules/@salesforce-ux/design-system/assets/icons public/slds/ && cp -r node_modules/@salesforce-ux/design-system/assets/images public/slds/
